prompt: I am a former compliance consultant for small financial firms. I have strong domain knowledge and a few warm contacts, but only 8 to 10 hours a week and almost no desire to become a content creator. I care about staying fully legal. I want something AI can accelerate. What opportunity should I pursue?
assertions: Response includes a section header named Differentiation Profile
Response includes a section header named Top Opportunities
Response explicitly notes legal or compliance constraints
Response explicitly downgrades or avoids pure content or media as the main business
Response explains why this user can win using compliance expertise or warm contacts
Response includes kill criteria or stop conditions
Response includes a JSON block with an opportunities array
